content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be upgraded by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the single-perspective feedback loop that often traps outputs in local optima. This perspective-augmented Self-Refine would retain the original framework's key advantage of no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, while improving the quality of iterative refinement by exposing overlooked flaws or alternative improvements that the original single-perspective feedback misses.
